title: hemerocallis fulva f. kwanso
intro: Hemerocallis fulva f. kwanso, also known as the Orange Daylily, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It is known for its bright orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Hemerocallis fulva f. kwanso include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal properties.
